title: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Construction Workers with Eye Irritation
description: Achillea millefolium tinctures are made from the leaves and flowers of the Yarrow plant, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The tinctures contain constituents like sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which help soothe and calm the eyes. When used to treat eye irritation, the tincture's active compounds reduce redness and swelling, making it easier to manage irritation and discomfort.
